title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates:
BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
